questions: Using the '7 Stages of Film Production' framework, identify the two specific online educational tracks at the New York Film Academy (NYFA) that correspond respectively to the 'Development' phase (creative writing) and the 'Financing, Marketing, and Distribution' phases (executive oversight). For the track corresponding to the Development phase, detail the two qualification options for entry into the '15-Week Online Television Pilot Workshop'. For the track corresponding to the Financing and Distribution phases (specifically the Online MA in Entrepreneurial Producing), list the stated tuition per semester and the three specific types of business-oriented 'plans' students create as real-world projects.

It then requires Wide Aggregation to retrieve distinct details (prerequisites vs. tuition/curriculum) located in completely different sections of the source text/website.

rounds.answer_a:
The "7 Stages of Film Production" framework maps to specific NYFA online tracks. The track corresponding to the 'Development' phase (creative writing) is the **15-Week Online Television Pilot Workshop**. To enter this workshop, students must qualify through either: 1) Completion of an introductory screenwriting course, or 2) Submitting a completed pilot script for review. [1]

The track corresponding to the 'Financing, Marketing, and Distribution' phases (executive oversight) is the **Online Master of Arts in Entrepreneurial Producing**. The stated tuition for this program is **$11,520 per semester**. As part of their real-world projects, students create three specific types of business-oriented "plans": 1) A Feature Film Plan, 2) A TV Series Plan, and 3) A Feature Documentary Plan. [2] [3]

## References
[1] New York Film Academy. "Online Screenwriting Programs." Accessed July 18, 2024. https://www.nyfa.edu/online/screenwriting/
[2] New York Film Academy. "Online Master of Arts in Entrepreneurial Producing." Accessed July 18, 2024. https://www.nyfa.edu/ma-entrepreneurial-producing-online/.
[3] New York Film Academy. "Tuition & Payment Plans." Accessed July 18, 2024. https://www.nyfa.edu/admissions/tuition-and-fees/
